## Freed v26.3.101

Full iPhone mobile compatibility and newsletter modal subscribe button scrunched on mobile

### Fixes

- Read version from package.json instead of npm_package_version

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
